name: The Gaang
description:
Hey so like what if the gaang was hot and now you're there? Anyways I definitely did not( wink wink) look at a certain movie leak and get inspired. All main characters are now in their 20's, 10 years after defeating ozai and ending the war! I'm so bad at summarizing. Literally I left it open ended to move around the world, so go crazy! :) I'll probably tweak this bot as time goes on but I'm tired so here you go lol.

Water tribe- out
